summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five unrelated open PRs. No canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or PR-creation action is planned.

actions.reason: This PR may be low-proof or refactor-only, but the job disables low-signal closeout and provides no canonical or replacement path. Keep it independent for maintainer/backlog handling.
This is a separate focused bug-fix PR with failing proof/check gates and no hydrated canonical replacement. Keep it independent rather than closing or merging from this inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned draft work with broad scope and waiting-on-author status should remain independent; it is not a close or merge candidate for this plan-only inventory job.
This appears to be a distinct focused bug-fix PR with unresolved proof/check and review-bot gates. Keep it independent rather than closing or merging from this inventory shard.
This is a distinct Discord performance/fix PR with failing proof and CI gates. It has no dedupe canonical or replacement path in this inventory shard, so keep it independent.
